abort.already_configured: This humidity sensor is already configured.

data.enable_model: Use the local self-learning model when it beats the heuristic

frontend_cards.title: Install recommended dashboard cards (via HACS)
frontend_cards.description:
The packaged Smart Dehumidifier dashboard (custom_components/smart_dehumidifier/lovelace/dashboard.yaml) uses two HACS frontend cards:

1. **Mushroom** (search "Mushroom" in HACS → Frontend)
2. **ApexCharts Card** (search "apexcharts-card")

Install both in HACS → Frontend, reload your browser, then paste the dashboard YAML via Edit dashboard → Add card → Manual. You can ignore/dismiss this if you prefer to build your own cards.
